title: Baryonyx catching Fish Coloring Page
seoTitle: Baryonyx catching Fish Coloring Page - Free PDF
seoDescription: Detailed Baryonyx using its large claws to catch fish in a shallow lake. Free PDF.
author: Antigravity Agent
funFacts: It had a long, crocodile-like snout and a massive 12-inch (31 cm) curved claw on its first finger, perfect for catching fish.
Designed for Medium difficulty, this specific sheet is perfect for practicing blending pastel shades using wax crayons or markers.
Coloring this drawing is a fantastic way to learn about geometric symmetry and relaxing design while developing fine motor coordination.
